# UX Checklist: Normalize Property Input to Canonical Location ID

**Purpose**: Validate UX requirements completeness, clarity, and coverage for normalization results if exposed to users.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/004-uc04-feature-spec/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all user-visible outcomes specified for success, geocoding failure, and unsupported boundary? [Completeness, Spec §Exception / Error Flows, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [ ] CHK002 Are UI requirements defined for presenting canonical location IDs to downstream users or flows? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK003 Are error messages specified clearly enough to distinguish geocoding failure from unsupported boundary? [Clarity, Spec §Non-Functional Requirements]
- [ ] CHK004 Are labels and prompts for any normalization UI defined consistently? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK005 Are accessibility requirements defined for any user-facing normalization UI or error messaging? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
